<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="integration-contract-for-pipelines">
<h1>Integration Contract for Pipelines</h1>
<section id="overview">
<h2>Overview</h2>
<p>This document specifies the contract and guarantees provided by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code>
for integration into text processing pipelines, particularly for TTS synthesis, token
alignment, and markup processing.</p>
</section>
<section id="core-guarantee-exact-slice-policy">
<h2>Core Guarantee: Exact-Slice Policy</h2>
<section id="the-invariant">
<h3>The Invariant</h3>
<p>For every segment returned by <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code>, the following invariant <strong>ALWAYS</strong>
holds:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">input_text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>This is called the <strong>exact-slice policy</strong>.</p>
</section>
<section id="what-this-means">
<h3>What This Means</h3>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p><strong>No Stripping</strong>: Segment text is never stripped, trimmed, or normalized</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Precise Mapping</strong>: Offsets point to the exact substring in the original input</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Whitespace Preserved</strong>: Leading/trailing whitespace from the original text is
included</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Safe for Slicing</strong>: You can reliably extract segments using Python slicing</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Monotonic Order</strong>: Segments are emitted in order with non-overlapping ranges</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
<section id="example">
<h3>Example</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;  Hello world.  </span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">  New paragraph.  &quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="c1"># This will ALWAYS pass</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>

    <span class="c1"># Segments may include whitespace from original text</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">repr</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">))</span>
<span class="c1"># Output might be: &#39;Hello world.&#39; or &#39;  Hello world.&#39; depending on boundaries</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="coordinate-space">
<h2>Coordinate Space</h2>
<section id="character-offsets">
<h3>Character Offsets</h3>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>All <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">char_start</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">char_end</span></code> values are in the <strong>coordinate space of the input
text</strong></p></li>
<li><p>Offsets are 0-based with exclusive end positions (Python slice convention)</p></li>
<li><p>Offsets are measured in Unicode code points (characters), not bytes</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="ssmd-markup-workflows">
<h3>SSMD/Markup Workflows</h3>
<p>When integrating with SSMD or other markup systems, offsets refer to whichever version
of the text you pass in:</p>
<p><strong>Option 1: Segment raw markup</strong></p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">text_with_markup</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Hello [world]{lang=&#39;de&#39;}. How are you?&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text_with_markup</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="c1"># Offsets are in the coordinate space of text_with_markup</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><strong>Option 2: Segment after escaping</strong></p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">ssmd</span>  <span class="c1"># hypothetical</span>
<span class="n">escaped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ssmd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">escape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text_with_markup</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">escaped</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="c1"># Offsets are in the coordinate space of escaped text</span>
<span class="c1"># Use these offsets to slice escaped text, then unescape each segment</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="determinism-and-stability">
<h2>Determinism and Stability</h2>
<section id="stable-ids">
<h3>Stable IDs</h3>
<p>Segment IDs are <strong>deterministic</strong> and <strong>stable</strong> across runs:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Same input text + same parameters → same IDs</p></li>
<li><p>ID format: <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">p{para}s{sent}c{clause}</span></code> or <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">p{para}s{sent}c{clause}:m{index}</span></code></p></li>
<li><p>IDs only change if segmentation rules change</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="deterministic-splitting">
<h3>Deterministic Splitting</h3>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code> is fully deterministic:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Same input always produces same segments</p></li>
<li><p>Same offsets, same text, same IDs</p></li>
<li><p>No randomness or runtime variation</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
<section id="max-chars-safety-splitting">
<h2>Max-Chars Safety Splitting</h2>
<section id="behavior">
<h3>Behavior</h3>
<p>When <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">max_chars</span></code> is specified:</p>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p>Segments exceeding <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">max_chars</span></code> are split further</p></li>
<li><p>Splitting happens at whitespace or punctuation boundaries</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Exact-slice policy is maintained</strong> even after splitting</p></li>
<li><p>Sub-segments get IDs like <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">p0s1:m0</span></code>, <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">p0s1:m1</span></code>, etc.</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
<section id="id1">
<h3>Example</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">long_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;This is a very long sentence that needs splitting.&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">long_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">20</span>  <span class="c1"># Respects max_chars</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">long_text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>  <span class="c1"># Invariant holds</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="c1"># Output:</span>
<span class="c1"># p0s0:m0: &#39;This is a very long &#39;</span>
<span class="c1"># p0s0:m1: &#39;sentence that needs &#39;</span>
<span class="c1"># p0s0:m2: &#39;splitting.&#39;</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="guarantee">
<h3>Guarantee</h3>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>All resulting segments have <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">len(seg.text)</span> <span class="pre">&lt;=</span> <span class="pre">max_chars</span></code> (except single words/tokens
that exceed the limit)</p></li>
<li><p>The exact-slice invariant holds for all sub-segments</p></li>
<li><p>IDs are stable and deterministic</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
<section id="integration-examples">
<h2>Integration Examples</h2>
<section id="tts-pipeline">
<h3>TTS Pipeline</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="c1"># Segment text</span>
<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Long document text...&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">500</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Process each segment</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="c1"># Offsets allow you to track position in original</span>
    <span class="n">audio</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tts_engine</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">synthesize</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Store mapping from audio to original text position</span>
    <span class="n">audio_segments</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">({</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;audio&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">audio</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;text_start&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;text_end&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;text&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;id&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span>
    <span class="p">})</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="token-alignment">
<h3>Token Alignment</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Hello world. How are you?&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="c1"># Tokenize the segment</span>
    <span class="n">tokens</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tokenizer</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tokenize</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Token offsets are relative to seg.text</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">token</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">tokens</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Map to absolute position in original text</span>
        <span class="n">abs_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span>
        <span class="n">abs_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span>

        <span class="c1"># Verify</span>
        <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">abs_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">abs_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="ssmd-span-slicing">
<h3>SSMD Span Slicing</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">COMMON_PATTERNS</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">validate_no_placeholder_breaks</span>

<span class="n">ssmd_text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Hello [world]{lang=&#39;de&#39;}. How are [you]</span><span class="si">{emphasis}</span><span class="s2">?&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ssmd_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Validate placeholders weren&#39;t broken</span>
<span class="n">warnings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">validate_no_placeholder_breaks</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">ssmd_text</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">placeholder_pattern</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">COMMON_PATTERNS</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;ssmd&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">warnings</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="c1"># Safe to slice - placeholders are intact</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Extract SSMD markup for this segment</span>
        <span class="n">ssmd_slice</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ssmd_text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="c1"># Process with SSMD parser...</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="error-handling">
<h2>Error Handling</h2>
<section id="invalid-inputs">
<h3>Invalid Inputs</h3>
<p>The function validates inputs and raises exceptions for invalid parameters:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># ValueError if max_chars &lt; 1</span>
<span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>  <span class="c1"># raises ValueError</span>

<span class="c1"># ValueError if mode is invalid</span>
<span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;invalid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>  <span class="c1"># raises ValueError</span>

<span class="c1"># ImportError if spaCy requested but not available</span>
<span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>  <span class="c1"># raises ImportError if no spaCy</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="empty-or-whitespace-only-text">
<h3>Empty or Whitespace-Only Text</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="p">[]</span>

<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;   </span><span class="se">\n\n</span><span class="s2">   &quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="p">[]</span>  <span class="c1"># No non-whitespace content</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="performance-considerations">
<h2>Performance Considerations</h2>
<section id="backend-selection">
<h3>Backend Selection</h3>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><strong>Regex backend</strong> (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">use_spacy=False</span></code>): 60x faster, good for simple text</p></li>
<li><p><strong>spaCy backend</strong> (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">use_spacy=True</span></code>): More accurate, better for complex text</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Auto-detect</strong> (<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">use_spacy=None</span></code>, default): Uses spaCy if installed</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="memory-usage">
<h3>Memory Usage</h3>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code>: Returns all segments at once (O(n) memory)</p></li>
<li><p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">iter_split_with_offsets()</span></code>: Streaming iterator (O(1) memory per segment)</p></li>
</ul>
<p>For large documents (&gt; 1 MB), consider using the iterator:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">segment</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">iter_split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">large_text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">500</span><span class="p">):</span>
    <span class="n">process</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="p">)</span>  <span class="c1"># Stream processing</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="versioning-and-compatibility">
<h2>Versioning and Compatibility</h2>
<section id="semantic-versioning">
<h3>Semantic Versioning</h3>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>The exact-slice invariant is part of the API contract</p></li>
<li><p>Breaking this invariant would be a major version change</p></li>
<li><p>IDs, offsets, and segmentation behavior follow semver</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="backward-compatibility">
<h3>Backward Compatibility</h3>
<p>New code using <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code> should:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Always verify the invariant in tests:
<code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">assert</span> <span class="pre">text[seg.char_start:seg.char_end]</span> <span class="pre">==</span> <span class="pre">seg.text</span></code></p></li>
<li><p>Not assume segments are stripped or normalized</p></li>
<li><p>Handle segments that may contain leading/trailing whitespace</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
<section id="summary">
<h2>Summary</h2>
<section id="key-guarantees">
<h3>Key Guarantees</h3>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p>✅ <strong>Exact-slice invariant</strong>: <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">text[seg.char_start:seg.char_end]</span> <span class="pre">==</span> <span class="pre">seg.text</span></code></p></li>
<li><p>✅ <strong>Deterministic</strong>: Same input → same output</p></li>
<li><p>✅ <strong>Stable IDs</strong>: IDs don’t change across runs</p></li>
<li><p>✅ <strong>Coordinate space</strong>: Offsets in original input text</p></li>
<li><p>✅ <strong>Max-chars safety</strong>: Invariant holds even with splitting</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
<section id="best-practices">
<h3>Best Practices</h3>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Always test the exact-slice invariant in your integration tests</p></li>
<li><p>Don’t strip or normalize segment text if you need to use offsets later</p></li>
<li><p>Use <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">max_chars</span></code> to ensure segments fit within processing constraints</p></li>
<li><p>Validate markup integrity with <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">validate_no_placeholder_breaks()</span></code></p></li>
</ul>
</section>
<section id="references">
<h3>References</h3>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><a class="reference internal" href="../offsets/"><span class="std std-doc">Offset Coordinate System</span></a></p></li>
<li><p><a class="reference internal" href="../streaming/"><span class="std std-doc">Streaming API</span></a></p></li>
<li><p><a class="reference internal" href="../offsets/"><span class="std std-doc">SSMD Integration Examples</span></a></p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
</section>
</div>
<script data-sphinxpress-script="search" defer>
(function () {
  "use strict";

  function initForm(form) {
    var input = form.querySelector(".tool-search-input");
    var results = form.querySelector(".tool-search-results");
    var navList = form.parentElement
      ? form.parentElement.querySelector(".tool-nav-list")
      : null;
    if (!input || !results) {
      return;
    }
    var emptyText = form.getAttribute("data-search-empty") || "No matches.";
    var indexUrl = form.getAttribute("data-search-index");
    if (!indexUrl) {
      hideForm();
      return;
    }

    var indexEntries = null;
    var indexError = false;
    var pendingQuery = null;

    function hideForm() {
      form.style.display = "none";
    }

    function escapeHtml(value) {
      return value
        .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
        .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
        .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
        .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
        .replace(/'/g, "&#39;");
    }

    function showEmpty() {
      results.innerHTML =
        '<p class="tool-search-empty">' + escapeHtml(emptyText) + "</p>";
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function clearResults() {
      results.innerHTML = "";
      results.hidden = true;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = false;
      }
    }

    function renderResults(entries, tokens) {
      if (!entries.length) {
        showEmpty();
        return;
      }
      var html = entries
        .map(function (entry) {
          var snippetHtml = renderSnippet(entry, tokens);
          var href = entry.url + "#sphinxpress-search-hit";
          return (
            '<li class="tool-search-result">' +
            '<a href="' +
            escapeHtml(href) +
            '">' +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-title">' +
            escapeHtml(entry.title) +
            "</p>" +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-snippet">' +
            snippetHtml +
            "</p>" +
            "</a>" +
            "</li>"
          );
        })
        .join("");
      results.innerHTML = html;
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function renderSnippet(entry, tokens) {
      var source = entry.snippet || "";
      if (!source) {
        return "";
      }
      var lower = source.toLowerCase();
      var firstToken = tokens[0] || "";
      var idx = lower.indexOf(firstToken);
      if (idx < 0) {
        return escapeHtml(source);
      }
      var before = source.slice(0, idx);
      var match = source.slice(idx, idx + firstToken.length);
      var after = source.slice(idx + firstToken.length);
      return (
        escapeHtml(before) +
        "<mark>" +
        escapeHtml(match) +
        "</mark>" +
        escapeHtml(after)
      );
    }

    function runQuery(query) {
      if (!indexEntries) {
        return;
      }
      var tokens = query
        .toLowerCase()
        .split(/\s+/)
        .filter(function (token) {
          return token.length > 0;
        });
      if (!tokens.length) {
        clearResults();
        return;
      }
      var hits = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < indexEntries.length; i += 1) {
        var entry = indexEntries[i];
        if (!entry.sections || !entry.sections.length) {
          continue;
        }
        var matched = true;
        var score = 0;
        for (var t = 0; t < tokens.length; t += 1) {
          var token = tokens[t];
          var found = false;
          var tokenScore = 0;
          for (var s = 0; s < entry.sections.length; s += 1) {
            var section = entry.sections[s];
            var lowerText = section.lower || "";
            if (!lowerText) {
              continue;
            }
            var from = 0;
            while (from <= lowerText.length) {
              var foundAt = lowerText.indexOf(token, from);
              if (foundAt < 0) {
                break;
              }
              tokenScore += 1;
              from = foundAt + token.length;
            }
            if (tokenScore > 0) {
              found = true;
            }
          }
          if (!found) {
            matched = false;
            break;
          }
          score += tokenScore;
        }
        if (matched) {
          hits.push({ entry: entry, score: score });
        }
      }
      hits.sort(function (a, b) {
        return b.score - a.score;
      });
      var top = hits.slice(0, 20).map(function (hit) {
        return hit.entry;
      });
      renderResults(top, tokens);
    }

    function handleInput() {
      var query = input.value || "";
      if (!query.trim()) {
        clearResults();
        pendingQuery = null;
        return;
      }
      if (indexError) {
        hideForm();
        return;
      }
      if (indexEntries) {
        runQuery(query);
      } else {
        pendingQuery = query;
      }
    }

    input.addEventListener("input", handleInput);

    fetch(indexUrl, { credentials: "same-origin" })
      .then(function (response) {
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error("HTTP " + response.status);
        }
        return response.json();
      })
      .then(function (payload) {
        if (
          !payload ||
          !Array.isArray(payload.entries) ||
          payload.entries.length === 0
        ) {
          hideForm();
          return;
        }
        indexEntries = payload.entries;
        if (pendingQuery) {
          runQuery(pendingQuery);
        }
      })
      .catch(function () {
        indexError = true;
        if (input.value && input.value.trim()) {
          hideForm();
        } else {
          hideForm();
        }
      });
  }

  function init() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll("form.tool-search");
    for (var i = 0; i < forms.length; i += 1) {
      initForm(forms[i]);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();

</script>
{% endraw %}
